entries.title: VLA runtime leaderboard (HTML)
entries.caveat: Shareable runtime ranking (latency/throughput + measured memory); SmolVLA #1, OpenVLA #2, pi0/groot shown as honest blocked rows. Not a task-success claim.

entries.title: VLA runtime leaderboard (Markdown)
entries.caveat: Runtime path only; ranking is latency/throughput, not skill.

entries.title: VLA runtime leaderboard (JSON)
entries.caveat: Machine-readable vla-zoo-leaderboard/v1 artifact; no task-success claim.

entries.title: VLA trajectory race (OpenVLA vs SmolVLA, animated GIF)
entries.caveat: Two recorded action streams overlaid on a shared scale — it reveals SmolVLA's deltas are much larger than OpenVLA's. Runtime path, not a real-EEF claim.

entries.title: Real-Time Chunking scheduler simulation (JSON)
entries.caveat: Deterministic simulation of latency-aware chunk scheduling: RTC freeze-prefix cuts the chunk-boundary jump ~76% vs naive async on a synthetic stream. Runtime scheduling property, not a policy-quality claim.

entries.title: Real-Time Chunking scheduler simulation (Markdown)
entries.caveat: Compares naive async vs RTC freeze chunk-boundary continuity. Models the scheduling layer, not the diffusion/flow gradient-guided sampler.

entries.title: Real-Time Chunking scheduler simulation (animated GIF)
entries.caveat: Stacks the naive-async and RTC-freeze emitted control streams so the boundary jumps (naive) vs continuity (freeze) are visible. Scheduling property, not a policy-quality claim.

entries.title: OpenVLA commanded EEF trajectory (animated GIF)
entries.caveat: Integrates OpenVLA's recorded eef_delta stream open-loop (action units, not metric). Shows what the policy commanded; not a task-success or real-EEF claim.

entries.title: SmolVLA commanded EEF trajectory (animated GIF)
entries.caveat: Integrates SmolVLA's recorded action stream open-loop (action units, not metric). Shows what the policy commanded; not a task-success or real-EEF claim.

entries.title: Quickstart terminal demo (animated GIF)

entries.title: ROS2 remote smoke check (SmolVLA)
entries.source_command: python3 scripts/record_ros2_remote_trace.py --model smolvla && vla-zoo ros remote-smoke-check --output-dir docs/assets/sample_ros2_remote_smolvla --model smolvla
entries.caveat: Real SmolVLA server driven through the ROS2 runtime node (RemoteVLAClient); runtime-path evidence, not task success.

entries.title: ROS2 remote smoke check (OpenVLA)
entries.source_command: python3 scripts/record_ros2_remote_trace.py --model openvla --remote-url http://127.0.0.1:PORT && vla-zoo ros remote-smoke-check --output-dir docs/assets/sample_ros2_remote_openvla --model openvla
entries.caveat: Real OpenVLA-7b (4-bit) server driven through the ROS2 runtime node (RemoteVLAClient); runtime-path evidence, not task success.

entries.title: SmolVLA real-scene action probe (PyBullet)
entries.caveat: Real SmolVLA driven on real PyBullet-rendered frames (21 queries, action dim 6); exercises the real image preprocessing path. Runtime-path latency/magnitude only, NOT task success or policy quality (policy_quality=not_verified).

entries.title: SmolVLA real-scene action log (PyBullet)
entries.caveat: Canonical vla_actions.jsonl action stream from real renders; replayable via vla-zoo bench-replay (success=None). Runtime path, not a task-success claim.

entries.title: OpenVLA real-scene action probe (PyBullet)
entries.source_command: vla-zoo demo action-probe --model openvla --allow-local-heavy --pretrained openvla/openvla-7b --device cuda:0 --adapter-kwarg load_in_4bit=true --adapter-kwarg unnorm_key=bridge_orig --out docs/assets/sample_pybullet_openvla/openvla_action_probe.jsonl --summary-md docs/assets/sample_pybullet_openvla/runtime_action_probe.md
entries.caveat: Real OpenVLA-7b (4-bit) driven on real PyBullet-rendered frames (21 queries, action dim 7); exercises the real image preprocessing path. Runtime-path latency/magnitude only, NOT task success (policy_quality=not_verified).

entries.title: OpenVLA real-scene action log (PyBullet)

entries.caveat: Canonical vla_actions.jsonl action stream from real renders; replayable via vla-zoo bench-replay (success=None). Runtime path, not a task-success claim.

entries.caveat: Blocked until the NVIDIA Isaac GR00T stack; no inference and no task-success claim.

entries.title: GR00T block probe
entries.source_command: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from vla_zoo import load_model; load_model('groot').predict(image=None, instruction='walk forward')"
entries.caveat: Reproducible block: load_model('groot').predict(...) raises MissingDependencyError and no GR00T package exists on PyPI; the real runtime is the NVIDIA Isaac-GR00T GitHub stack. No inference, no task-success claim.

entries.title: SmolVLA remote /v1/predict probe
entries.source_command: vla-zoo serve --model smolvla --pretrained lerobot/smolvla_base --device cuda && vla-zoo remote-probe --model smolvla --remote-url http://127.0.0.1:PORT
entries.caveat: Real SmolVLA server returned a typed 6-DoF action over HTTP; runtime-path evidence, not task success.

entries.title: SmolVLA bf16 dtype-serve remote probe
entries.source_command: vla-zoo serve --model smolvla --pretrained lerobot/smolvla_base --device cuda --dtype bfloat16 && vla-zoo remote-probe --model smolvla --remote-url http://127.0.0.1:PORT --strict
entries.caveat: Verifies the serve --dtype path: a bf16-loaded SmolVLA server (params confirmed torch.bfloat16) returned a typed 6-DoF action over HTTP. Runtime-path evidence, not task success.

entries.title: OpenVLA remote /v1/predict probe
entries.source_command: vla-zoo serve --model openvla --pretrained openvla/openvla-7b --device cuda:0 --load-in-4bit && vla-zoo remote-probe --model openvla --remote-url http://127.0.0.1:PORT
entries.caveat: Real OpenVLA-7b 4-bit server returned a typed 7-DoF action over HTTP; runtime-path evidence, not task success.

entries.title: pi0 compatibility probe
entries.caveat: pi0/openpi is remote-first and still needs a recorded real action probe.
